verdict_reason: BG 2.71's tags are non-attachment-to-praise, deprecation-management, engineering-pathology. CROSS-REFERENCE WITH SAME-TAG VERSES: (a) non-attachment-to-praise is shared with 2.70 (the launch's load passes through her) — 2.71 specifies the privative-compound disposition (nirmama / nirahaṅkāra) under which 2.70's stability becomes operational. COMPATIBLE — 2.71 names the precondition; 2.70 names the resulting state-stability. (b) engineering-pathology is shared with 2.46 (premature-mastery / rule-amnesia) and 2.67 (input-stream-drift as prajñā-thief). 2.71 names the 'this is MY code' identity-bond pathology. These are three distinct pathologies, all named operationally and falsifiably — coherent under a doctrine of 'engineering pathologies are nameable structural failure modes'. (c) deprecation-management is introduced by 2.71 in the available corpus. CROSS-REFERENCES: 2.71 references 2.72 ('the rung immediately below 2.72's brāhmī-sthiti'), which is structurally correct and supported by the source pack's traditional_meaning_consensus. Pass on both 6.1 and 6.5.
